title: Tropical Depression Warning
description: A tropical depression has been spotted east of Mindanao. Strong winds and rough seas expected in the Surigao Strait area. All small craft advisories are in effect. Passengers are advised to check with their operators before travel.

title: Life Jacket Compliance Reminder
description: MARINA reminds all passengers and vessel operators that wearing life jackets is mandatory during the entire voyage. Non-compliance will result in penalties for operators and denied boarding for passengers.

title: Dapa Port Maintenance - Pier 2
description: Pier 2 of Dapa Port will undergo scheduled maintenance from June 15-17. All vessels will dock at Pier 1 during this period. Expect minor delays in boarding and disembarking. Cargo processing may take additional 30 minutes.

title: Sea State Advisory - Moderate Waves
description: The Philippine Coast Guard reports moderate sea conditions (wave height 1.5-2.5m) in the Surigao-Dinagat corridor. Small motorized bancas below 15 gross tonnage are advised not to travel. Larger vessels may proceed with caution.

title: New Terminal Building Open at Surigao City Port
description: The new passenger terminal building at Surigao City Port is now fully operational. Passengers can enjoy improved waiting areas, additional ticketing counters, and enhanced cargo processing facilities. BANCA digital ticketing kiosks are available at the entrance.
